fields.name: Service Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the event associated with the service item.

fields.name: Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the entry, as assigned from the specified number series when the entry was created.

fields.name: Event No.
fields.tooltip: Contains the number that the program has assigned to the event occurred on the service item. The program uses this field internally.

fields.name: Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the document number of the event associated with the service item.

fields.name: After
fields.tooltip: Specifies the value of the field modified after the event takes place.

fields.name: Before
fields.tooltip: Specifies the previous value of the field, modified after the event takes place.

fields.name: Change Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date of the event.

fields.name: Change Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the time of the event.

fields.name: User ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the user who posted the entry, to be used, for example, in the change log.

fields.name: Document Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the document type of the service item associated with the event, such as contract, order, or quote.
